request.example: She made a polite request for help.

reserve.example: We reserved a table for four.
Reserve some energy for the end.

resist.example: I couldn't resist the chocolate cake.
resist.example_zh: 我抗拒不了巧克力蛋糕。

resource.example: Water is a valuable natural resource.

response.example: I am waiting for his response.

responsibility.example: It is your responsibility to clean up.

restrict.example: The school restricts phone use in class.
restrict.example_zh: 學校限制上課時使用手機。

reveal.example: She revealed her secret to me.
reveal.example_zh: 她向我透露了她的秘密。

ribbon.example: She tied her hair with a red ribbon.

rid.example: We need to get rid of the old furniture.
rid.example_zh: 我們得處理掉那些舊家具。

ripe.example: The bananas are ripe and ready to eat.

risk.example: There is a risk of falling on the ice.
He risked his life to save the boy.
risk.example_zh: 他冒著生命危險救那男孩。

roar.example: The lion let out a loud roar.
roar.example_zh: 獅子發出一聲響亮的吼叫。

roast.example: She roasted a chicken for dinner.
We had roast chicken for dinner.

rob.example: Two men tried to rob the bank.

robe.example: She wore a long silk robe.

romantic.example: They had a romantic dinner together.
romantic.example_zh: 他們共進了一頓浪漫的晚餐。

rot.example: The fruit will rot if left in the sun.
rot.example_zh: 水果放在太陽下會爛掉。

rot.example: There is rot in the old wood.

rotten.example: She threw away the rotten apple.

rough.example: The surface of the rock is rough.
rough.example_zh: 這塊岩石的表面很粗糙。

rough.example: Give me a rough idea of the cost.
rough.example_zh: 給我一個大概的費用概念。

roughly.example: The trip takes roughly two hours.
roughly.example_zh: 這趟路程大約要兩小時。

routine.example: Brushing teeth is part of my daily routine.
routine.example_zh: 刷牙是我每天例行的一部分。

routine.example: It was just a routine check.

rug.example: A soft rug lay by the bed.
rug.example_zh: 床邊鋪著一張柔軟的小地毯。

rumor.example: Don't believe every rumor you hear.
rumor.example_zh: 別相信你聽到的每個謠言。

rush.example: Don't rush; we have plenty of time.
rush.example_zh: 別急，我們有充足的時間。

rush.example: We left in a rush this morning.

rust.example: The old gate is covered with rust.
The tools rusted in the rain.

sack.example: He carried a sack of rice on his back.

sake.zh: 緣故、目的（for the sake of）
sake.example: She gave up her job for the sake of her children.
sake.example_zh: 她為了孩子放棄了工作。

salary.example: He earns a good salary at his new job.
salary.example_zh: 他在新工作領到不錯的薪水。

satisfactory.example_zh: 她的工作表現令人滿意。

sauce.example: She poured tomato sauce on the pasta.
sauce.example_zh: 她把番茄醬汁淋在義大利麵上。

saucer.example: The cup sat on a small saucer.
saucer.example_zh: 杯子放在一個小碟子上。

sausage.example: We grilled sausages at the barbecue.

saving.example: She used her savings to buy a bike.
saving.example_zh: 她用存款買了一輛腳踏車。

saving.example: The new method is a big time saving.
saving.example_zh: 這個新方法大大節省了時間。

scale.example: He weighed the apples on the scale.
The map is drawn to scale.
scale.example_zh: 這張地圖是按比例繪製的。

scarce.example: Water is scarce in the desert.

scarf.example: She wore a warm scarf in winter.
scarf.example_zh: 她冬天圍著一條溫暖的圍巾。

scary.example: We watched a scary movie last night.
scary.example_zh: 我們昨晚看了一部恐怖片。

scholar.example: The scholar studied old books for years.
scholar.example_zh: 這位學者研究古書多年。

scholarship.example: She won a scholarship to college.
scholarship.example_zh: 她拿到了大學的獎學金。

scientific.example: They used a scientific method to test it.
scientific.example_zh: 他們用科學方法來測試它。

scientist.example: The scientist made an important discovery.
scientist.example_zh: 那位科學家有了重要發現。

scissors.example: Use scissors to cut the paper.

scout.example: The scout searched the area ahead.
scout.example_zh: 偵察員搜查了前方的區域。

scout.example: They scouted the area for a campsite.
scout.example_zh: 他們勘查那個區域找露營地。

scream.example: She screamed when she saw the spider.
scream.example_zh: 她看到蜘蛛時尖叫起來。

scream.example: We heard a scream from the house.
scream.example_zh: 我們聽見屋裡傳來尖叫聲。

screw.example: He tightened the screw with a screwdriver.
screw.example_zh: 他用螺絲起子鎖緊螺絲。

scrub.example: She scrubbed the dirty pot clean.
The floor needs a good scrub.

seal.example: A seal rested on the rocks.
seal.example_zh: 一隻海豹在岩石上休息。

seal.example: She sealed the letter in an envelope.

security.example_zh: 機場保全檢查了我們的行李。

semester.example: We have exams at the end of the semester.

senior.example: She is a senior student at the school.
senior.example_zh: 她是這所學校的高年級學生。

senior.example: He is senior to me at work.
senior.example_zh: 他在工作上是我的上司。

sensible.example: It was a sensible choice to save money.

separation.example: The separation from her family was hard.
separation.example_zh: 與家人分離對她來說很難受。

sexual.example: The science book explains sexual differences.
sexual.example_zh: 這本科學書解釋了性別差異。

sexy.example: The model wore a sexy dress on stage.
sexy.example_zh: 模特兒在台上穿著一件性感的洋裝。

shadow.example: The tree cast a long shadow.
shadow.example_zh: 那棵樹投下長長的影子。
